actual_title: Efficiency vs. Understanding in Computational Systems

cards.title: Efficiency Claim Evidence
cards.governance_note: Define baseline, workload, resource metric, performance gain, memory gain, cost gain, and energy awareness.

cards.title: Understanding Preservation
cards.governance_note: Score readability, debuggability, explainability, observability, auditability, reproducibility, and maintainability.

cards.title: Responsible Optimization
cards.governance_note: Require trade-off communication, governance readiness, recourse, and an interpretability floor for consequential systems.
